languages.text: {n}Металлический гигант, облаченный в тяжеловесную мантию и опирающийся на зловещего вида посох, медленно поворачивает голову, обозревая дворец Даргонуса. В неподвижной маске, заменяющей {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносу{/g} лицо, не читается ни единой эмоции, однако в противоестественном голосе отчетливо слышна досада.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Металлический гигант, облаченный в тяжеловесную мантию и опирающийся на зловещего вида посох, медленно поворачивает голову, обозревая дворец Даргонуса. В неподвижной маске, заменяющей {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносу{/g} лицо, не читается ни единой эмоции, однако в противоестественном голосе отчетливо слышна досада.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Металлический гигант, облаченный в тяжеловесную мантию и опирающийся на зловещего вида посох, медленно поворачивает голову, обозревая дворец Даргонуса. В неподвижной маске, заменяющей {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносу{/g} лицо, не читается ни единой эмоции, однако в противоестественном голосе отчетливо слышна досада.{/n}

You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

{n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the xenos's face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

{n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the xenos's face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}重厚なマントを身にまとい、不吉な杖を握る金属の巨人。彼はゆっくりと首を回し、ドラゴヌスの宮殿を見渡す。異形の顔の代わりに置かれた不動のマスクには感情の兆しはないが、彼の不自然な声には、明らかに苛立ちが感じられる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the xenos's face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 重厚なマントを身にまとい、不吉な杖を握る金属の巨人。彼はゆっくりと首を回し、ドラゴヌスの宮殿を見渡す。異形の顔の代わりに置かれた不動のマスクには感情の兆しはないが、彼の不自然な声には、明らかに苛立ちが感じられる。

languages.text: {n}金属巨人身披沉重的斗篷，手握一把邪异权杖。他缓慢地转过头，审视着达戈努斯的宫殿。{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}那张纹丝不动的面具上看不出丝毫情绪，但他那极不自然的嗓音里，却透着明显的恼怒。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}金属巨人身披沉重的斗篷，手握一把邪异权杖。他缓慢地转过头，审视着达戈努斯的宫殿。{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}那张纹丝不动的面具上看不出丝毫情绪，但他那极不自然的嗓音里，却透着明显的恼怒。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El gigante de metal, ataviado con un manto pesado y armado con un báculo de aspecto siniestro, gira la cabeza con lentitud, analizando el palacio de Dargonus. No ves ningún rastro de emoción en la máscara inmóvil que ocupa el lugar del rostro del {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}, pero su voz antinatural, en cambio, sí revela una clara irritación.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El gigante de metal, ataviado con un manto pesado y armado con un báculo de aspecto siniestro, gira la cabeza con lentitud, analizando el palacio de Dargonus. No ves ningún rastro de emoción en la máscara inmóvil que ocupa el lugar del rostro del {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}, pero su voz antinatural, en cambio, sí revela una clara irritación.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der metallene Riese mit dem schweren Mantel und einem unheilvollen Stab dreht langsam seinen Kopf und betrachtet den Palast von Dargonus. Du siehst keinerlei Emotion auf der regungslosen Maske, die das Gesicht des {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} bedeckt, aber seine unnatürliche Stimme klingt eindeutig verärgert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der metallene Riese mit dem schweren Mantel und einem unheilvollen Stab dreht langsam seinen Kopf und betrachtet den Palast von Dargonus. Du siehst keinerlei Emotion auf der regungslosen Maske, die das Gesicht des {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} bedeckt, aber seine unnatürliche Stimme klingt eindeutig verärgert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le géant de métal, qui porte un lourd manteau et tient un bâton à l'air sinistre, tourne lentement la tête en observant le palais de Dargonus. Bien que le masque couvrant son visage ne laisse transparaître aucune émotion, vous décelez une certaine contrariété dans sa voix étrange.{/n}{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}{/g}
languages.original_text: {n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le géant de métal, qui porte un lourd manteau et tient un bâton à l'air sinistre, tourne lentement la tête en observant le palais de Dargonus. Bien que le masque couvrant son visage ne laisse transparaître aucune émotion, vous décelez une certaine contrariété dans sa voix étrange.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ağır bir pelerine bürünmüş ve uğursuz görünümlü bir asa tutan metal dev, Dargonus sarayını inceleyerek başını yavaşça çeviriyor. {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Zenonun{/g} yüzünün yerine duran hareketsiz maskede hiçbir duygu belirtisi görmesen de doğal olmayan sesinde bariz bir sinir bozucu tını var.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The metal giant, draped in a weighty mantle and holding a sinister-looking staff, turns his head slowly, surveying the palace of Dargonus. You see no hint of emotion in the unmoving mask that rests in place of the {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}'s face, but in his unnatural voice, however, there is a clear note of vexation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ağır bir pelerine bürünmüş ve uğursuz görünümlü bir asa tutan metal dev, Dargonus sarayını inceleyerek başını yavaşça çeviriyor. {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Zenonun{/g} yüzünün yerine duran hareketsiz maskede hiçbir duygu belirtisi görmesen de doğal olmayan sesinde bariz bir sinir bozucu tını var.{/n}
